coach_notes: For a strong arts-media career, focus on developing typography, layout, and Figma—these are core design skills that directly enhance your brand storytelling and Adobe expertise. Start by taking free online courses on platforms like Coursera or YouTube, and practice by redesigning a project using Figma and layout principles. You're already on a great path with your existing skills; adding these will make your portfolio even more compelling to employers.

jobs.title: Photography Intern
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong alignment with photography skills, Adobe Lightroom, and basic video editing. Intern role expects learning, which matches your current experience.
jobs.gaps: No professional photography internship experience listed; may need portfolio examples of event or studio work.

jobs.title: Content Creator
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Content creation leverages photography, graphic design, and creative problem-solving. Social media content is a natural fit.
jobs.gaps: No explicit content strategy or social media management experience; may need to demonstrate content calendar planning.

jobs.title: Video Production Intern Summer 2026
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Basic video editing and Adobe skills are relevant. Summer 2026 timeline allows for skill development.
jobs.gaps: No specific video production or advanced editing software (e.g., Premiere Pro) mentioned; need to build a video portfolio.

jobs.title: Associate Art Director (Video)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Creative problem-solving and graphic design skills are foundational for art direction.
jobs.gaps: No video production or art direction experience; lacks leadership, project management, and advanced video skills required for associate level.

jobs.title: Design_Videographer (Bilingual-Korean, English) Lyndhurst, NJ
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Photography and video editing skills are relevant to the role.
jobs.gaps: No bilingual Korean/English skills; lacks professional videography and design experience for a specialized role.
